name: Paul Mooney
blurb: A longtime writing partner of Richard Pryor, he wrote for Sanford and Son, was head writer on the first season of In Living Color, and reached new audiences as Negrodamus and the host of recurring sketches.
bio: Paul Mooney was an American stand-up comedian, writer, and actor whose blunt, confrontational comedy centered on race, African American history, and American politics. A longtime writing partner of Richard Pryor, he wrote for Sanford and Son, was head writer on the first season of In Living Color, and reached new audiences as Negrodamus and the host of recurring sketches on Chappelle's Show. His acting credits include The Buddy Holly Story and Spike Lee's Bamboozled.

timeline.ev: Writes material for Richard Pryor including his Saturday Night Live appearance
Serves as head writer on The Richard Pryor Show
Becomes head writer for the first season of In Living Color
Plays the comedian Junebug in Spike Lee's Bamboozled
Appears on Chappelle's Show as Negrodamus and in Ask a Black Dude
Publishes the memoir Black Is the New White

accolades: Co-wrote landmark Richard Pryor albums including Bicentennial Nigger and Live on the Sunset Strip
Head writer for the first season of In Living Color
Author of the memoir Black Is the New White, with a foreword by Dave Chappelle

It's the End of the World

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Mooney died 2021 with no maintained official channel; clean embeddable stage CLIPS are scarce. Verified embeddable items are licensed-distributor uploads (Comedy Dynamics' LOL Network, official YouTube Movies full features) plus one Richard Pryor estate-channel stage clip. Most circulating Mooney footage is fan re-rips (rejected).

bits.yt_title: Paul Mooney: It's the End of the World!
